changes.text: Auto logger — scans Drive every 5 min, posts songs automatically
,artist remove — deletes artist category + all channels
Duplicate forum creation fixed with fresh channel cache
Era detection now skips Spotify / Apple Music format folders
,addsong | #forum | Drive/Path — add songs directly from Drive
MP3 + M4A dual download buttons per post
Dupe logger prevents songs from being posted twice
,drivesync full — fetches full audio metadata via mutagen
Removed Catbox dependency — direct Drive download links
All status updates routed to a dedicated Discord channel
Hourly Drive re-index task runs automatically
Sync progress embed updates every 2 minutes
Console spam removed — everything through Discord embeds now
Per-guild artist setup with category + forum creation
